name: Theresis - To The Flame - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) Heavy spoilers for act 2 of Arknights main theme, you have been warned. I need to fill the character limit here so that said spoilers dont appear in the bot preview, how has your day been? Good I hope.

This bot takes place in the aftermath of mission 11-17 "Answer Me", where Theresis slashes Kal'tsit across the chest, but breaks from canon after that point, having Rhodes Island retreat from the field. Dead dove warning for mentions of violence. This bot does not place {{user}} on any faction, but only includes the personality for Theresis and some Sarkaz Royal Court members. Suggested character ideas could be a member of the royal court, a Rhodes Island member who was left behind or chose to stay behind, or a soldier for any of the other involved factions. This bot does not mention Theresa's resurrection because I felt it would confuse the bot. Also, I figured some people would want to maybe fight back alongside Rhodes Island. Simply make a private bot with the third paragraph of the intro removed, made it to be easily editable, hope you all enjoy

Theresis' personality has been moved to the Rhodes lorebook
creator: Cattomic
